title: ReGlass
description: Liquid Glass Implemented On Your Favorite Pixelated And Cubic Game
body:
# ReGlass
![ReGlass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82bc9d25738ed6f0e1b923c71306f696be15d213_0.webp)


### ReGlass is an overhaul to Minecraft's low resolution and boring UI, with the goal of redesigning all Minecraft's UIs.

Take a look at the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/reglass/gallery) to see **some** of the redesigned UIs.
